Did not enter. the abstract says 1195 mg AFDM m2 y1, but that appears to be based only on the "top 6 most abundant" taxa. It's not clear what percentage of total mass that those top 6 taxa comprise. If they make up less than ~ 95%, then the total annual production is likely not reliable.

In Table 1, only insects are listed. There is an "other" category that has 77 mg AFDM m2 y1. That amount is included in the total here. in other words, I assumed that all community production = all insect production.
